# Spells
# https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Spells&prop=wikitext

This page includes both custom daggers and old daggers that have been edited from how they appear on the production RotMG server.
{| class="article-table"
!Spell
!Damage
!Shots
!Range
!MP Cost
!Stats
!Pierce
!Armor Pierce
!Obstacle Pierce
!Effects
!Fame Bonus
!Tier
!Legendary/Primal
Effect
|-
|Planetary Destruction Spell
|85-170
|20
|17
|85
|<nowiki>+3vit</nowiki>
+3wis
|
|
|
|
|6%
|GL
|
|-
|The Searing Shower
|90-180
|20
|10.08
|100
|
|
|
|
|
|5%
|Artifact
|
|-
|Spell Full of Nature
|120-150
|20
|14.25
|90
|
|
|
|
|
|5%
|Artifact
|
|-
|Mysterious Incantation
|55-100
|20*4
|9
|130
|<nowiki>+2wis</nowiki>
+2def

-4att
|
|
|
|
|6%
|Heroic
|
|-
|Carnivorous Sentient Spell
|80-125
|20
|6.5
|90
|
|yes
|
|
|Boomerang Shots
|4%
|Legendary
|Physical Barrier
|-
|Music of the Gods
|75-200
|25
|16
|115
|
|
|yes
|
|Berserk:
1 sec
|
|Legendary
|Last Hope
|-
|Recurring Terror Spell
|200-300
|8
|2
|75
|<nowiki>-20hp</nowiki>
+2att

+4dex

+2def

-5vit
|
|
|yes
|Parametric
Shots
|
|Legendary
|Angel's Touch
|-
|Tablet of the King's Avatar
|130-140
|20
|0.53
|180
|<nowiki>+4wis</nowiki>
+40mp
|yes
|
|
|Boomerang Shots
Cooldown:

1 sec
|6%
|Legendary
|Curse
|}
